evidence_model: product commits followed by exact detached verification and an evidence-only commit

verification_environment.network_note: A superseded worktree submodule command attempted its configured HTTPS URL and was blocked before transfer. The passing exact worktree used the existing local pinned checkout as its file-protocol source.
verification_environment.cache_strategy: isolated exact-worktree target and output trees; no duplicate agents or GitHub runners

exactly_lowered: reviewed vendored RestrictValid branches with typed recipient and dynamic amount
closed library Dig shapes with typed counts, filter, destinations, and canonical option metadata
numbered Chapter events and effects resolving every referenced cost-free DB SVar
ordered creature-subtype removal before Continuous, Animate, and AnimateAll replacement types
source-bound closed-zone moves carrying explicit origin and destination guards
still_quarantined: new or unreviewed restricted-mana branch vocabulary
open Dig chooser, imprint, movement, and destination shapes
graveyard moves needing LKI, remembered-object, or collection bindings
all shapes that lose a rules-observable distinction in the current typed IR
semantic_boundaries.claim: structural translation and compiler validity only; runtime and card-specific semantic maturity remain separate T3.5 and T3.6 evidence

findings: source-bound closed-zone moves initially lost their origin guard
restricted-mana validation initially accepted arbitrary suffixes after a known head
dynamic and type-replacement edge tests were incomplete

review_history.finding: planner deduplication undercounted distinct Chapter SVars sharing one blocker family

remediation: move_zone_from preserves source origin and destination
RestrictValid accepts only the reviewed vendored branch vocabulary
dynamic mana and Dig plus Animate and AnimateAll tests were added
distinct Chapter keyword roots now sum safely within a deduplicated family
new operations are append-only and prior serialized operation indices are pinned

review_history.result: No P0/P1 product or fail-closed findings after exact-checkpoint remediation; one stale narrative metric was corrected to the exact 58,340 observation count.
review_history.residual_boundary: structural mapping only; runtime and card semantics remain outside this batch

commands.result: full workspace passed after serialization-prefix remediation
format, clippy -D warnings, full workspace tests, deterministic translation and planner replay, compiler/database validation, 235 oracle scenarios, and coverage passed

continuation.rule: T3.5 and T3.6 remain parallel lanes and do not replace or pause measured T3.3 script translation and ability-use mapping
